title: Add an AI assistant for questions about C-LARA-2 functionality
notes: Created from human suggestion #24 (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-05-30). The requested capability is a platform-facing assistant that can answer questions about C-LARA-2 functionality, documentation, workflows, known issues, and roadmap context by using a repo-aware Codex/OpenAI model or equivalent retrieval-backed architecture. Initial scope is discovery and planning rather than direct code execution: add a roadmap document, define safe API boundaries, clarify repository/documentation context packaging, and later prototype a read-only conversational support view. Priority is P2 because it is strategically aligned with the project goal of AI-understandable documentation and user support, but it is not an immediate production blocker and has security, cost, and context-governance questions to resolve before implementation.
